text.title: Continuous Delivery Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the cd-basics methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: audit-prereqs
step.action: Confirm CI green + ≥70% test coverage + IaC presence + feature flag service.
step.decision-gate: If any missing, install it first; do not attempt CD.

step.name: design-stages
step.action: Sketch build → unit → integration → staging-deploy → e2e → prod-deploy stages.

step.name: wire-flags
step.action: Wrap all new user-visible behavior in a default-off flag.

step.name: expand-contract-migrations
step.action: Split destructive migrations into expand → backfill → contract.

step.name: emit-dora-and-monitor
step.action: Emit DORA events on each deploy. Track deployment frequency + change failure rate.
